inputs.label: Vent Area Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of net free vent area to floor area. Building code: 1/150 (no vapor barrier) ≈ 0.00667; 1/1500 (with vapor barrier) ≈ 0.000667.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of net free vent area to floor area. Building code: 1/150 (no vapor barrier) ≈ 0.00667; 1/1500 (with vapor barrier) ≈ 0.000667.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Net serbest havalandırma alanının taban alanına oranı. Bina yönetmeliği: buhar bariyeri yoksa 1/150 ≈ 0.00667; buhar bariyeri varsa 1/1500 ≈ 0.000667.
